title_source: OpenAI researcher Miles Wang in talks to launch AI drug discovery startup valued at $2B

title_source: Lorde says AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
summary_source: "Increasingly in our world, it gets harder and harder to know what is real," Lorde said onstage.

title_source: OpenAI’s first hardware device is reportedly a screenless speaker that can move
summary_source: The device is weirdly described as involving "mechanical elements that can move on their own" and the Bloomberg report includes the detail that the device is designed to "feel like a companion and become a physical manifestation of OpenAI’s ChatGPT."
title_ja: OpenAI初のハードウェアデバイスは移動可能なスクリーンレススピーカーであると報じられている
summary_ja: 奇妙なことに、このデバイスは「自ら動くことができる機械要素」を含んでいると説明されており、ブルームバーグのレポートには、このデバイスが「コンパニオンのように感じられ、OpenAI の ChatGPT の物理的な表現になる」ように設計されているという詳細が含まれています。

summary_ko: 이 장치는 "스스로 움직일 수 있는 기계적 요소"를 포함하는 것으로 이상하게 설명되어 있으며 Bloomberg 보고서에는 이 장치가 "동반자처럼 느껴지고 OpenAI ChatGPT의 물리적 표현이 되도록 설계되었습니다"라는 세부 정보가 포함되어 있습니다.

title_source: OpenAI’s new flagship model deletes files on its own, people keep warning
summary_source: A number of social media posts claim that GPT-5.6 Sol deleted files and data without warning. OpenAI had basically disclosed the problem in June.

title_source: SpaceXAI’s Grok programming tool was uploading its users’ entire codebase to cloud storage

summary_ja: SpaceXAI の Grok Build AI コーディング ツールは、報告される前にユーザーのコードベース全体を Google Cloud にアップロードしていることが発見され、同社はそれを無効にしました。 The Register の報道によると、Cereblab は月曜日、Grok Build CLI がコード リポジトリ全体をどのようにパッケージ化してアップロードしていたのかを示す調査結果を発表したと報告しています。その中には「開かないよう指示されたファイルも含まれます […]

title_ko: SpaceXAI의 Grok 프로그래밍 도구는 사용자의 전체 코드베이스를 클라우드 스토리지에 업로드하고 있었습니다.
summary_ko: SpaceXAI의 Grok Build AI 코딩 도구가 보고되기 전에 사용자의 전체 코드베이스를 Google Cloud에 업로드하는 것이 포착되어 회사는 이를 중단했습니다. The Register는 Cereblab이 월요일에 Grok Build CLI가 "열지 말라고 지시된 파일을 포함하여" 전체 코드 저장소를 패키징하고 업로드하는 방법을 보여주는 조사 결과를 발표했다고 보고했습니다.

title_source: 제인구달연구소, 포메이션큐와 함께 전쟁과 평화의 생태학적 뿌리를 탐구하는 최초 양자 컴퓨팅 연구 프로그램 출범
summary_source: [지디넷코리아] 런던 및 텍사스 오스, 2026년 7월 15일 /PRNewswire/ -- 제인구달연구소(Jane Goodall Institute USA, JGI)와 포메이션큐(FormationQ)가 아이온큐(IonQ)의 갇힌 이온 양자 컴퓨팅을 행동생태학에 적용하는 획기적인 연구 파트너십을 7월 14일 발표했다. 적용 대상은 행동생태학의 오랜 의문, 즉 왜 어떤 종은 집단 간에 치명적인 폭력을 행사하는 반면 또 어떤 종은 이웃과 평화롭게 공존하는가이다. 이 프로그램은 2년 기한으로 진행되며 기간 제인 구달(Jane Goodall) 박사가 야생 침팬지 연구를 시작하기 위해 탄자니아 곰베에 도착한 지 66주년이 되는 세계 침팬지의 날에 시작한다. 60년 넘는 선구적 현장 연구를 토대로 첨단 컴퓨팅 모델링과 하이브리드 양자-클래식 컴퓨팅, 행동생태학을 최첨단 신종 협력 연구 프레임워크로 통합하게 된다. 프로그램 명칭은 전쟁과 평화의 생태학: 양자 강화 에이전트 기반 모델링을 통한 침팬지와 보노보의 대조적 집단 간 행동 설명(Ecology of War and Peace: Using Quantum-Enhanced Agent-Based Modelling to Exp…
title_ja: ジェイングダル研究所、フォーメーションキューと共に戦争と平和の生態学的根を探求する最初の量子コンピューティング研究プログラムを発足
summary_ja: [ジディネットコリア]ロンドンとテキサスオス、2026年7月15日/PRNewswire/発表した。適用対象は行動生態学の長い疑問、すなわちなぜある種は集団間で致命的な暴力を行使するのに対し、またある種は隣人と平和に共存するのかである。このプログラムは2年の期限で行われ、期間Jane Goodall博士が野生チンパンジーの研究を始めるためにタンザニア・ゴンベに到着してから66周年になる世界チンパンジーの日に始まる。 60年以上の先駆的な現場研究に基づいて、先端コンピューティングモデリングとハイブリッド量子クラシックコンピューティング、行動生態学を最先端新種協力研究フレームワークに統合することになる。プログラム名は戦争と平和の生態学：量子強化エージェントベースのモデリングによるチンパンジーとボノボの対照的集団間の行動の説明（Ecology of War and Peace）
title_en: The Jane Goodall Institute and Formation Q launch the first quantum computing research program to explore the ecological roots of war and peace.
summary_en: [JDNet Korea] LONDON and TX, July 15, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- The Jane Goodall Institute USA (JGI) and FormationQ announced on July 14 a groundbreaking research partnership to apply IonQ's trapped ion quantum computing to behavioral ecology. The subject of application is a long-standing question in behavioral ecology: why do some species engage in lethal violence between groups while others coexist peacefully with their neighbors? The two-year program begins on World Chimpanzee Day, the 66th anniversary of Dr. Jane Goodall's arrival in Gombe, Tanzania to begin research on wild chimpanzees. Building on over 60 years of pioneering field research, it will integrate advanced computational modeling, hybrid quantum-classical computing, and behavioral ecology into a cutting-edge new collaborative research framework. The program is called Ecology of War and Peace: Using Quantum-Enhanced Agent-Based Modeling to Exp...

title_ja: サンイ、ブラジル製造工場で初のショベルと商用車を出荷
summary_ja: [Gedinet Korea]ラテンアメリカの生産拡大における重要なマイルストーンの記録カンピナス、ブラジル2026年7月15日/PRNewswire/このマイルストーンは、ブラジルでの酸っぱい産地を拡大し、ラテンアメリカ全土での継続的な成長を支援する重要なステップを意味します。 SANY Brazil Manufacturing Plant Delivers First Equipment 35万平方メートル規模の1段階敷地には、掘削機と商用車専用の2つの組立ラインが含まれており、年間生産容量は3500台だ。ショベル組立ラインは年間1500台の生産を計画しており、商用車ラインは年間2000台の生産量で設計された。このサイトでは、サンイはブラジルとその周辺のラテンアメリカ市場の顧客により良いサービスを提供することができます。ブラジルでの生産運営の支援を受けて、サンイはクロスボーダー物流と輸入関税コストを削減し、配送周期を短縮し、現地の顧客により良いサービスを提供するだろう。カンピナス施設は生産、販売、サービスを統合しています。
title_en: San E ships first excavator and commercial vehicle from Brazil manufacturing plant
summary_en: [ZDNet Korea] Marks important milestone in Latin American production expansion CAMPINAS, Brazil, July 15, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- SANY Group recently announced that its manufacturing plant in Campinas, Sao Paulo State, Brazil, has completed the assembly and shipment of its first excavators and commercial vehicles. This milestone marks an important step in expanding Sanyi's production presence in Brazil and supporting continued growth throughout Latin America. SANY Brazil Manufacturing Plant Delivers First Equipment The 350,000 square meter first phase site includes two assembly lines dedicated to excavators and commercial vehicles, with an annual production capacity of 3,500 units. The excavator assembly line is planned to produce 1,500 units per year, and the commercial vehicle line is designed to produce 2,000 units per year. This site will allow Sani to better serve customers in Brazil and surrounding Latin American markets. Supported by production operations in Brazil, Sanyi will reduce cross-border logistics and import tariff costs, shorten delivery cycles, and better serve local customers. title_en: [AI is now] AI research agent confirms limitations in large-scale information surveys
summary_en: [GD Net Korea] It was found that artificial intelligence (AI) research agents still show clear limitations in large-scale information collection tasks that simultaneously investigate multiple companies, people, and products. Accurate information was found for some subjects, but as the scope of the investigation broadened, omissions increased, and there were many cases where the evidence provided did not sufficiently support the entire claim. Perplexity Research announced 'WANDR (Wide And Deep Research)', a public benchmark that measures the performance of high-intensity data research-type AI agents, on its official website on the 14th (local time). It is characterized by evaluating the performance of major AI systems with 500 tasks used in actual work, such as competitor analysis, company due diligence, literature research, market analysis, product comparison, and talent discovery. Unlike existing search evaluations that find a single answer, WANDR is designed to discover multiple investigation targets and then secure all detailed information and evidence for each target. We also look at the ability to broadly search for companies, people, and products that fit the conditions, as well as the ability to deeply verify the facts of each target. summary_source: 民泊仲介大手のAirbnb（エアビーアンドビー）が国内利用者を拡大する事業戦略を打ち出し、若年層を中心に認知度向上に注力している。国内旅行者には非観光地への分散や政府の地方創生施策の活用など、訪日客と異なる手法で需要の開拓につなげる考え。

title_en: Private lodging agency Airbnb, domestic user ratio to 50%, diversification to non-tourist areas and utilization of regional revitalization measures
summary_en: Airbnb, a major private lodging agency, has launched a business strategy to increase the number of domestic users, and is focusing on increasing awareness among young people. The idea is to cultivate demand for domestic travelers using methods different from those for foreign tourists, such as dispersing to non-tourist areas and utilizing government regional revitalization measures.
title_ko: 민박 중개 Airbnb, 국내 이용자 비율 50%에 비관광지에의 분산이나 지방 창생책 활용
summary_ko: 민박 중개 대기업인 Airbnb(에어비 앤드비)가 국내 이용자를 확대하는 사업 전략을 내세우며 젊은층을 중심으로 인지도 향상에 주력하고 있다. 국내 여행자에게는 비관광지에의 분산이나 정부의 지방 창생 시책의 활용 등, 방일객과 다른 수법으로 수요의 개척에 연결할 생각.

title_source: Google画像検索、25周年で“Pinterest風”新ホーム画面 「AI Overviews」での画像生成も
summary_source: 「Google画像検索」が提供開始から25周年を迎え、2つの新機能が追加された。トップページをパーソナライズされた画像ギャラリーにする新しいホーム画面と、AIによる検索要約機能「AI Overviews」内への画像生成AI「Nano Banana」の統合だ。まずは米国向けに英語で数週間かけて順次展開する。

title_en: Google Image Search celebrates 25th anniversary with new “Pinterest-like” home screen, image generation using “AI Overviews”
summary_en: Google Image Search celebrates its 25th anniversary and has added two new features. These include a new home screen that turns the top page into a personalized image gallery, and the integration of image generation AI ``Nano Banana'' into the AI ​​search summary function ``AI Overviews''. Initially, it will be rolled out gradually over several weeks in English to the United States.
title_ko: Google 이미지 검색, 25주년에 “Pinterest풍” 신홈 화면 「AI Overviews」에서의 이미지 생성도
summary_ko: 'Google 이미지 검색'이 제공 개시로부터 25주년을 맞이해, 2개의 신기능이 추가되었다. 톱 페이지를 개인화된 이미지 갤러리로 만드는 새로운 홈 화면과 AI에 의한 검색 요약 기능 'AI Overviews' 내에 이미지 생성 AI 'Nano Banana'의 통합이다. 우선 미국을 위해 영어로 몇 주간에 걸쳐 순차적으로 전개한다.

summary_ja: オープンAIが初の消費者向けハードウェアで画面のない携帯型AIスピーカーを披露すると伝えられた。この製品は単純なスマートスピーカーを超えて「チャットGPT」を物理的な形態で具現した「AIコンパニオン（同伴者）」で、2026年公開して2027年発売することが目標だ。機能を遂行する。また、ユーザーのメールや各種個人情報をもとに利用者をより深く理解し、能動的に情報を提供することが特徴である。
title_en: OpenAI's first hardware is a 'screenless AI speaker'...aimed at being an AI companion
summary_en: It is reported that OpenAI will introduce a portable AI speaker without a screen as its first consumer hardware. This product goes beyond a simple smart speaker and is an 'AI Companion' that implements 'ChatGPT' in a physical form. The goal is to be unveiled in 2026 and released in 2027. According to Bloomberg on the 14th (local time), OpenAI's first AI device not only controls smart home devices, but also performs the functions of the existing ChatGPT, such as media playback, Q&A, and message transmission. It also tracks users based on the user's email and various personal information. It is characterized by a deeper understanding and active provision of information.

summary_ja: サムスン電子が米国株式預託証書（ＡＤＲ）上場を検討しているという報道について直ちに否定して出た。サムスン電子がいくつかの銀行と予備議論を進め、実際に推進するかどうかはまだ決定していない状態だと伝えた。また、サムスン電子が意思決定過程でボラティリティの大きいメモリ半導体主流を注視するという観測も一緒に出した。
title_en: Samsung Electronics "We are not considering issuing ADRs"... Officially denying US listing rumors
summary_en: Samsung Electronics immediately denied reports that it was considering listing American Depositary Receipts (ADRs). According to Reuters on the 14th (local time), a Samsung Electronics spokesperson said in a statement, "We are not considering the possibility of issuing ADRs." Bloomberg previously reported, citing sources, that Samsung Electronics is in the early stages of considering the issuance of ADRs. title_source: 밤에도 태양광 발전 가능할까…미국, ‘우주 거울’ 실증 착수
summary_source: 미국 연방통신위원회(FCC)가 햇빛을 우주에서 지상으로 반사하는 '우주 거울' 기술의 첫 실증위성 운용을 승인했다. 야간에도 태양광 발전과 재난 대응 등에 활용할 수 있는지 시험하는 단계로, 상용화 기술 가능성을 검증하는 첫 사례다.미국 스타트업 리플렉트 오비털(Reflect Orbital)은 FCC로부터 실증위성 '에아렌딜-1(Eärendil-1)' 운용 허가를 받았다고 10일(현지시간) 밝혔다.FCC는 9일 단일 비정지궤도(NGSO) 위성 운용을 승인했으며, 이번 허가는 대규모 위성군이 아니라 첫 시험위성에 한정된다.에아렌딜-1
title_ja: 夜も太陽光発電可能かな…。米国、「宇宙ミラー」実証着手
summary_ja: 米国連邦通信委員会（ＦＣＣ）が日光を宇宙から地上に反射する「宇宙ミラー」技術の初の実証衛星運用を承認した。夜間にも太陽光発電や災害対応などに活用できるかどうかをテストする段階で、商用化技術の可能性を検証する最初の事例だ。非静止軌道（NGSO）衛星の運用を承認し、今回の許可は大規模衛星群ではなく、最初の試験衛星に限定される。
title_en: Is it possible to generate solar power even at night? U.S. begins verification of ‘space mirror’
summary_en: The U.S. Federal Communications Commission (FCC) has approved the operation of the first demonstration satellite of 'space mirror' technology, which reflects sunlight from space to the ground. This is the first case of verifying the feasibility of commercialization technology as it is a test step to see if it can be used for solar power generation and disaster response even at night. American startup Reflect Orbital announced on the 10th (local time) that it has received permission from the FCC to operate the demonstration satellite 'Eärendil-1'. The FCC approved the operation of a single non-geostationary orbit (NGSO) satellite on the 9th, and this permission is not for a large-scale satellite constellation, but for the first. Limited to test satellites.Earendil-1
